front.title: Use Cases and Practices for Intent-Based Networking

author.organization: Department of Computer Science and Engineering

abstract.t: This document proposes several use cases of Intent-Based Networking (IBN) and the methodologies to differ each use case by following the lifecycle of a real IBN system. It includes the initial system awareness and data collection for the IBN system, the construction of the IBN system, the IBN system integration and deployment, and the evaluation and optimization of the IBN system. Practice learnings are also summarized to instruct the construction of next generation network management systems with the integration of IBN techniques.
